[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001011110 5
1 010110111 6
2 010001111 5
3 101010101 5
4 111111100 7
5 011111101 7
6 101010101 5
7 100110010 4

01 10 101010100 4
12 21 011111100 6
23 32 001010101 4
34 43 100010000 2
45 54 000010010 2
56 65 000010110 3
67 76 010000111 4
70 07 000000101 2

02 20 001010101 4
13 31 101010100 4
24 42 000110000 2
35 53 001010100 3
46 64 000110010 3
57 75 000001110 3
60 06 000010101 3
71 17 010001100 3

03 30 101010101 5 match 3 6
14 41 100110000 3
25 52 001011100 4
36 63 000010101 3
47 74 000000010 1
50 05 001010100 3
61 16 010110100 4
72 27 010001101 4

04 40 100010000 2
15 51 001011100 4
26 62 010110101 5
37 73 000000101 2
